questions.question: What nation saw 973,000 of its students tote guns to school in the 1997-98 school year?
What union's presidents have included Ed Asner, Patty Duke, Charlton Heston and Ronald Reagan?
What drug, delivered intravenously, did the Mayo Clinic find would ease postsurgery pains for habitual coffee and soda drinkers?
What percentage of Mike Tyson's 1995 earnings came from endorsements?
What did the prophet 'Bob' of the Church of the SubGenius predict would happen at 7 a.m. on July 5, 1998?
